# recordName

**Instance Property**

The official name of the record.

## Declaration

```swift
var recordName: String! { get }
```

## Managing Record Attributes

- **addValue(_:toAttribute:)**: Adds a value to an attribute of the record.
- **recordDetails(forAttributes:)**: Returns a dictionary of attributes with their respective values.
- **recordType**: The record’s type.
- **removeValues(forAttribute:)**: Removes all values from an attribute of the record.
- **removeValue(_:fromAttribute:)**: Removes a value from an attribute of the record.
- **setValue(_:forAttribute:)**: Sets the values of an attribute of the record.
- **synchronize()**: Synchronizes the record from the directory to get current data and commit changes.
- **values(forAttribute:)**: Returns the values of an attribute of the record.
